archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite & Precision, Dark Mode)
rationale: For a Discord-inspired community app, 'Performance Pro' offers the deep obsidian blacks required for long sessions (eye strain reduction) while providing a high-visibility 'Tactical' look for data clarity (channels, status, text). Volt Blue acts as the kinetic trigger for notifications and active states without overwhelming the user.

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold rounded-md px-4 py-3 active:opacity-80 flex-row justify-center items-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#262626] text-white font-bold rounded-md px-4 py-3 active:opacity-80 flex-row justify-center items-center
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#A3A3A3] font-bold rounded-md px-4 py-3 active:bg-[#1A1A1A] flex-row justify-center items-center

inputs.default: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-3 placeholder:text-[#737373] focus:border-[#007AFF]

chat_bubbles.user: bg-[#007AFF] text-white rounded-t-xl rounded-bl-xl rounded-br-sm p-3
chat_bubbles.other: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#262626] text-[#FFFFFF] rounded-t-xl rounded-br-xl rounded-bl-sm p-3

server_icon.default: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-[#1E1E1E] border border-[#262626] justify-center items-center overflow-hidden
server_icon.active: w-12 h-12 rounded-[16px] bg-[#007AFF] justify-center items-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-[#007AFF]

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism_note: In React Native Expo, use Expo BlurView (intensity 80, tint dark) or transparent rgba backgrounds (e.g., rgba(10,10,10,0.85)) for floating headers and bottom tabs.
visual_enhancers.borders: Always use 1px borders (#262626) to separate dark surfaces. Do not let surfaces blend into each other without structural borders.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon streaks for Auth/Login screen background to give a dynamic, modern feel.
User avatar for profiles and member list (Woman in dark hoodie).
User avatar for direct messages or contacts (Man in glasses).
Karasu silhouette image for the default server banner or empty state illustration.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for Expo React Native using standard .js files (no .tsx). Utilize NativeWind for styling with the provided Tailwind class equivalents, or map them manually via StyleSheet.
Follow Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) strictly: Base background must be Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) with surface layers stepping up slightly (#141414, #1A1A1A).
Do NOT use Inter for fonts. Use 'Chivo' (or closest equivalent) for headers and 'Manrope' for body text.

The layout requires a Server List (typically a left drawer or flat list on the side) and a Channel List next to it. Since it's mobile, use a Drawer navigator for the Server/Channel list, or a dedicated screen flow.
Use Phosphor Icons (phosphor-react-native) or lucide-react-native. They provide the sharp, technical look required for this app.
MANDATORY: Every interactive element (buttons, text inputs, server icons, channel rows, message rows) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'login-button', 'server-icon-1', 'chat-input').
Never use generic placeholder images (like via.placeholder). Use only the URLs from the media section.
Ensure input fields have an active/focus state utilizing the Volt Blue (#007AFF) border color.
To achieve a true 'app' feel, minimize borders on the main chat scrollview, but keep structural borders (1px solid #262626) on the top header and bottom input area.
